filesCreated.purpose: Parent editor component with tab navigation, content panel, and title sync
Parent frontend template with desktop tabs and mobile accordion HTML
Frontend JavaScript for tab switching, accordion toggle, ARIA, keyboard nav, responsive mode switching
Child block metadata with tabTitle and tabDescription attributes
Child editor component with context-based visibility, toolbar popover, sidebar controls
Child frontend template with prose styling

warnings: CSS optimization warnings (pre-existing gap variable parsing)
Asset size limit warnings (pre-existing editor.js and screen.js bundle sizes)

syncStatus.notes: TSX and PHP structures match: section.tabs > div.container > ThemeHeading + tab area (desktop flex with tab buttons + content panel, mobile accordion items). Child blocks use prose styling in both TSX and PHP.

variationsIncluded: Full Content (Yellow Accent) - 4 tabs, with buttons and descriptions
Blue Accent - Get Involved - 3 tabs, no buttons, with list content
Many Tabs (Edge Case) - 8 tabs, orange accent
Long Content in Tab - 2 tabs, extensive inner content, purple accent

implementationNotes.accentColors: Uses bg-accent for active tab buttons and mobile open accordion items, bg-accent-lighter for desktop content panel. Color classes (yellow, blue, neon-green, orange, purple, green) applied via wrapping group blocks on test page.
implementationNotes.desktopLayout: Vertical tab buttons on left with rounded-l-3xl border, content panel on right with bg-accent-lighter rounded-3xl. Active tab gets bg-accent, loses fixed height.
implementationNotes.mobileLayout: Accordion pattern with full-width rounded-3xl items, plus/minus icon toggle, bg-accent on open items.
implementationNotes.tabTitleSync: Parent useEffect syncs tabsHeading and tabsDescription arrays from child block attributes.
implementationNotes.tabContext: TabsCurrent React context exported from Tabs.tsx, consumed by TabsItem.tsx for editor visibility.
implementationNotes.frontendJs: Tabs.js handles: tab selection, accordion toggle, ARIA attributes (tablist/tab/tabpanel for desktop, button/region for mobile), keyboard navigation (ArrowUp/Down, Home/End), responsive mode switching with content cloning to mobile accordion panels.
implementationNotes.contentCloning: Mobile accordion content is cloned from desktop tab panels via JS on mode switch and initialization. This approach keeps a single source of truth in the desktop tabs-container while providing the accordion layout on mobile.
